'''dongathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:voetstoots|voetstoots]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voetstoots|voetstoots]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dongathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongathithi|dongathithi]] || [[word:dongathiji|dongathiji]] || [[word:dongathishi|dongathishi]] || [[word:dongathiki|dongathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongathuthuthu|dongathuthuthu]] || [[word:dongathujuju|dongathujuju]] || [[word:dongathushushu|dongathushushu]] || [[word:dongathukuku|dongathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongathuthu|dongathuthu]] || [[word:dongathuju|dongathuju]] || [[word:dongathushu|dongathushu]] || [[word:dongathuku|dongathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongathufthuf|dongathufthuf]] || [[word:dongathufjuf|dongathufjuf]] || [[word:dongathufshuf|dongathufshuf]] || [[word:dongathufkuf|dongathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongathethe|dongathethe]] || [[word:dongatheje|dongatheje]] || [[word:dongatheshe|dongatheshe]] || [[word:dongatheke|dongatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongathothotho|dongathothotho]] || [[word:dongathojojo|dongathojojo]] || [[word:dongathoshosho|dongathoshosho]] || [[word:dongathokoko|dongathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongathotho|dongathotho]] || [[word:dongathojo|dongathojo]] || [[word:dongathosho|dongathosho]] || [[word:dongathoko|dongathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongathofthof|dongathofthof]] || [[word:dongathofjof|dongathofjof]] || [[word:dongathofshof|dongathofshof]] || [[word:dongathofkof|dongathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfthĂŻf|dongathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfjĂŻf|dongathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfshĂŻf|dongathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfkĂŻf|dongathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dongathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dongathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dongathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dongathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfthĂŻf|dongathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfjĂŻf|dongathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfshĂŻf|dongathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfkĂŻf|dongathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfthĂŻf|dongathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfjĂŻf|dongathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfshĂŻf|dongathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dongathĂŻfkĂŻf|dongathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dongathĂŠthĂŠ|dongathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dongathĂŠjĂŠ|dongathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dongathĂŠshĂŠ|dongathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dongathĂŠkĂŠ|dongathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dongathathatha|dongathathatha]] || [[word:dongathajaja|dongathajaja]] || [[word:dongathashasha|dongathashasha]] || [[word:dongathakaka|dongathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dongathatha|dongathatha]] || [[word:dongathaja|dongathaja]] || [[word:dongathasha|dongathasha]] || [[word:dongathaka|dongathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dongathafthaf|dongathafthaf]] || [[word:dongathafjaf|dongathafjaf]] || [[word:dongathafshaf|dongathafshaf]] || [[word:dongathafkaf|dongathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dongathasha|dongathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dongathshĂ«sha|dongathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dongathrosha|dongathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dongathmusha|dongathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dongathyasha|dongathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godongathnkshĂ«sha|godongathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godongathnkrosha|godongathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godongathnkmusha|godongathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godongathnkyasha|godongathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dongangathasha|dongangathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dongangathshĂ«sha|dongangathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dongangathrosha|dongangathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dongangathmusha|dongangathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dongangathyasha|dongangathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godongangathnkshĂ«sha|godongangathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godongangathnkrosha|godongangathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godongangathnkmusha|godongangathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godongangathnkyasha|godongangathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dengĂŠthasha|dengĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dengĂŠthshĂ«sha|dengĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dengĂŠthrosha|dengĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dengĂŠthmusha|dengĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dengĂŠthyasha|dengĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godengĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|godengĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godengĂŠthnkrosha|godengĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godengĂŠthnkmusha|godengĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godengĂŠthnkyasha|godengĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dongfathasha|dongfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dongfathshĂ«sha|dongfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dongfathrosha|dongfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dongfathmusha|dongfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dongfathyasha|dongfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godongfathnkshĂ«sha|godongfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godongfathnkrosha|godongfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godongfathnkmusha|godongfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godongfathnkyasha|godongfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
